In a robot coup,  chop garlic to a mince
Add garlic and oil to a hotel oven, ensuring the oil covers the garlic fully.
In a deck oven set to ~500°F, toast the garlic very similarly to garlic confit
After ~ 45 minutes, stir the garlic and check the cook.
Cook for an additional ~45 minutes, or until garlic is very fragrant and has browned sufficiently.
Cool to room temp, then strain the garlic solids from the oil.
Reserve oil in quart containers, reserve garlic solids in separate quart containers.
Chill in blast chiller and reserve in cooler
